@@ -0,0 +1,165 @@
+import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';
+import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
+import 'package:mia_studio/core/design_system/mia_colors.dart';
+import 'package:mia_studio/core/design_system/mia_fonts.dart';
+import 'package:mia_studio/domain/models/core_telemetry_data.dart';
+import 'package:mia_studio/domain/models/extended_telemetry_data.dart';
+import 'package:mia_studio/domain/models/vfd_fault_code.dart';
+import 'package:mia_studio/presentation/device_control/localization/control_strings.dart';
+
+class TelemetryModal extends StatelessWidget {
+  final ValueListenable<CoreTelemetryData?> coreTelemetryListenable;
+  final ValueListenable<ExtendedTelemetryData?> extendedTelemetryListenable;
+  final ControlStrings strings;
+
+  const TelemetryModal({
+    super.key,
+    required this.coreTelemetryListenable,
+    required this.extendedTelemetryListenable,
+    required this.strings,
+  });
+
+  @override
+  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
+    return Container(
+      decoration: BoxDecoration(
+        color: MIAColors.surface2,
+        borderRadius: const BorderRadius.vertical(top: Radius.circular(24)),
+      ),
+      constraints: BoxConstraints(
+        maxHeight: MediaQuery.of(context).size.height * 0.65,
+      ),
+      child: Column(
+        mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
+        children: [
+          _buildHeader(context),
+          Flexible(child: _buildContent()),
+        ],
+      ),
+    );
+  }
+
+  Widget _buildHeader(BuildContext context) {
+    return Container(
+      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 24, vertical: 16),
+      decoration: BoxDecoration(
+        border: Border(
+          bottom: BorderSide(color: MIAColors.borderDefault, width: 1),
+        ),
+      ),
+      child: Row(
+        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
+        children: [
+          Text(
+            strings.telemetryTitle,
+            style: MIAFonts.headlineMedium.copyWith(
+              color: MIAColors.textPrimary,
+            ),
+          ),
+          IconButton(
+            icon: const Icon(
+              Icons.close,
+              color: MIAColors.textPrimary,
+            ),
+            onPressed: () => Navigator.of(context).pop(),
+          ),
+        ],
+      ),
+    );
+  }
+
+  Widget _buildContent() {
+    return ValueListenableBuilder<CoreTelemetryData?>(
+      valueListenable: coreTelemetryListenable,
+      builder: (context, coreTelemetry, _) {
+        return ValueListenableBuilder<ExtendedTelemetryData?>(
+          valueListenable: extendedTelemetryListenable,
+          builder: (context, extendedTelemetry, _) {
+            return Padding(
+              padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
+              child: GridView.count(
+                crossAxisCount: 2,
+                shrinkWrap: true,
+                physics: const NeverScrollableScrollPhysics(),
+                crossAxisSpacing: 12,
+                mainAxisSpacing: 12,
+                childAspectRatio: 1.25,
+                children: [
+                  _buildParameterCard(
+                    strings.telemetryFrequency,
+                    coreTelemetry?.frequencyFormatted ?? '—',
+                    isHighlighted: true,
+                  ),
+                  _buildParameterCard(
+                    strings.telemetryTargetFrequency,
+                    coreTelemetry?.targetFrequencyFormatted ?? '—',
+                  ),
+                  _buildParameterCard(
+                    strings.telemetryBusVoltage,
+                    extendedTelemetry?.busVoltageFormatted ?? '—',
+                  ),
+                  _buildParameterCard(
+                    strings.telemetryCurrent,
+                    extendedTelemetry?.currentFormatted ?? '—',
+                  ),
+                  _buildParameterCard(
+                    strings.telemetryOutputVoltage,
+                    extendedTelemetry?.outputVoltageFormatted ?? '—',
+                  ),
+                  _buildParameterCard(
+                    strings.telemetryErrorCode,
+                    _formatErrorCode(extendedTelemetry?.faultCode ?? 0),
+                  ),
+                ],
+              ),
+            );
+          },
+        );
+      },
+    );
+  }
+
+  Widget _buildParameterCard(String label, String value, {bool isHighlighted = false}) {
+    return Container(
+      decoration: BoxDecoration(
+        color: MIAColors.surface1,
+        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
+        border: Border.all(color: MIAColors.borderDefault),
+      ),
+      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
+      child: Column(
+        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
+        children: [
+          Text(
+            label,
+            style: MIAFonts.bodyMedium.copyWith(
+              color: MIAColors.textTertiary,
+            ),
+            textAlign: TextAlign.center,
+          ),
+          const SizedBox(height: 8),
+          Flexible(
+            child: Text(
+              value,
+              style: MIAFonts.monoLarge.copyWith(
+                color: isHighlighted ? MIAColors.neonGreen : MIAColors.textPrimary,
+                fontSize: value.contains('\n') ? 16 : 24,
+              ),
+              textAlign: TextAlign.center,
+              maxLines: 2,
+              overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
+            ),
+          ),
+        ],
+      ),
+    );
+  }
+
+  String _formatErrorCode(int faultCode) {
+    if (faultCode == 0) {
+      return strings.telemetryNoError;
+    }
+    final fault = VfdFaultCode.fromCode(faultCode);
+    return '${fault.formattedCode}\n${fault.descriptionRu}';
+  }
+}
